data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon uses a microservices architecture to allow independently deployable services.
data.technical_spec: AWS Lambda, Amazon ECS (Elastic Container Service), API Gateway

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Leveraging AWS services for real-time data processing and event-driven workflows.
data.technical_spec: Amazon Kinesis, AWS Step Functions, Amazon SNS

data.title: Scalable Load Balancing
data.description: Amazon's infrastructure utilizes load balancing for handling millions of requests simultaneously.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancing, Auto Scaling Groups

data.title: Global Content Delivery
data.description: Uses Content Delivery Networks to ensure quick load times globally.

data.title: Highly Available Databases
data.description: Ensures data availability and integrity with distributed databases.
